response.overview: Do you ever wonder what a young boy dreams about when he's looking through the latest fashion catalog? Well, wonder no more! "A Boi's Dream" takes you into the dream world of new cummer Kirk Kelley, whether its about rough sex, the delivery boy, shaving, showers, or the hottest three way around with his new friends Chance Davidsom & Sebastion Grandview. "A Boi's Dream" is over an hour of Action Packed excitement!
response.title: A Boi's Dream
